home.heroTitle: Navigate Government Documents Without the Confusion.
home.heroSubtitle: Get clear, step-by-step guidance for your Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, and state certificates. No legal jargon, just simple steps.
home.popularServicesSubtitle: Select a document to view requirements, latest fees, and official application portals.
home.panCardDesc: New applications, corrections, or duplicate requests.
home.passportDesc: Fresh issuance, renewals, and Police Clearance Certificates.
home.aadhaarDesc: Address updates, demographic changes, and PVC card orders.
home.stateCertsDesc: Income, Caste, and Domicile certificates for various states.
home.howHelpsSubtitle: We don't just give you a link. We guide you from preparation to submission.
home.step1Desc: For example, "I lost my PAN card and need a duplicate." We ask a few simple questions to understand your exact need.
home.step2Desc: We analyze current government rules and provide the exact list of valid proofs required based on your specific profile.
home.step3Desc: We direct you to the official portal, tell you exactly which forms to fill, and how to book necessary appointments.
home.trustSubtitle: Dealing with government documents requires precision. Here is our commitment to you.
home.upToDateDesc: Government rules change frequently. Our guidance updates in real-time with the latest official circulars and fee structures.
home.privacyDesc: We don't store your sensitive documents. We guide you, but you apply directly and securely on the official government portals.
home.zeroJargonDesc: We translate complex bureaucratic terms and confusing legal instructions into plain English and regional languages.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of citizens who have successfully navigated complex documentation with GUIDOC.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your government document guidance, saved resources, and eligibility history from one place.
dashboard.searchDocumentsDesc: Find government documents, eligibility, and official application guides.
dashboard.checkEligibilityDesc: Get a personalized eligibility roadmap before applying.
dashboard.myProfileDesc: Manage your account settings and preferences.
dashboard.trackApplicationsDesc: Monitor the progress of your government document applications.
